attribution: Powered by Brisnet data. Analysis, not wagering advice. 18+/21+ (where required). 1-800-GAMBLER.

flags.reason: Ranks #1 in our power figure blend; model 28% vs 22% morning-line implied (+5.3 pts)

durability.label: Likely bet down
durability.basis: A short board price the late money bets down. Nearly every flag this short in our record closed below the play-at, so unless the board is still long near post this is usually a pass — you are paid the closing price, not the early one.

exotics.note: model-fair, no takeout - an overlay is when the board's probable pays more

flags.reason: Ranks #2 in our power figure blend; closer in a contested-pace setup; model 15% vs 11% morning-line implied (+3.8 pts)

durability.label: Toss-up
durability.basis: A mid board price — it can hold or get bet down. Watch the board near post; the play stands only if it is still at or above the play-at at the close.

exotics.note: model-fair, no takeout - an overlay is when the board's probable pays more
